docket_entries.description: DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) TRE CLIFTON, COMPLIANCE MANAGER FILED BY PLAINTIFF ASIAN, INC.

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF MAR-16-2020 - CONTINUED PER STIPULATION OF ALL PARTIES TO MAY-01-2020 AT 1:30 PM IN DEPT. 506. PLAINTIFF ASIAN INC, REPRESENTED BY TRE CLIFTON IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT MARIA ONTIVEROS, REPRESENTED BY ANA MILLAN, DAUGHTER IS PRESENT. JUDGE A. JAMES ROBERTSON II; CLERK: W. TRUPEK. NOT REPORTED.(506)
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $5,738.00 FILED BY ASIAN, INC. AS TO DEFENDANT ONTIVEROS, MARIA ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR MAR-16-2020 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506
ORDER RE: CONTINUANCE PER STIPULATED AGREEMENT OF PARTIES IN OPEN COURT. MATTER CONTINUED TO MAY 1, 2020 AT 1:30 P.M. (SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT)
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JUL-21-2020 - CONTINUED ON THE COURT'S OWN MOTION TO DEC-15-2020 AT 1:30 PM IN DEPT. 506. (W. TRUPEK 506)
ORDER RE: DISMISSAL WITHOUT PREJUDICE. NO APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF.

THE COURT ORDERS DISMISSAL OF THE ENTIRE ACTION WITHOUT PREJUDICE. NO APPEAREANCE BY PLAINTIFF ASIAN INC. DEFENDANT MARIA ONTIVEROS, ASSISTED BY COURT CERTIFIED SPANISH INTERPERTER, DANIEL NAVARRO, IS PRESENT. JUDGE: MICHELLE TONG; CLERK: W. TRUPEK. NOT REPORTED.(506)
